process.title: Enquiry Mapping

faqs.q: What does Saar Biotech manufacture for third-party pharma companies?
faqs.a: Saar Biotech manufactures approved pharmaceutical dosage forms such as syrups, suspensions, oral liquids, drops, ointments, creams, gels, topical solutions, and sprays for pharma marketing companies and healthcare brands.

faqs.q: Does Saar Biotech support private-label pharma manufacturing?
faqs.a: Yes. Saar Biotech supports private-label and third-party manufacturing with product selection, packing coordination, documentation support, production planning, quality checks, and dispatch coordination.

faqs.q: Where is the Saar Biotech manufacturing facility located?
faqs.a: Saar Biotech operates from Baddi, District Solan, Himachal Pradesh, with a manufacturing campus and quality-control setup for pharmaceutical contract manufacturing.

faqs.q: How can a company request a manufacturing quotation?
faqs.a: A company can request a quotation by sharing the product category, approved composition or dosage details, packing requirement, quantity, target market, and expected timeline through the enquiry form, phone, or email.

planner.label: Liquid Manufacturing
planner.title: Liquid Dosage Manufacturing Requirements
planner.text: For syrups, oral suspensions, and drop formats — share formulation type, packing size, quantity, and any stability or taste requirements.
checks: Pack size, cap type, bottle material
planner.summary: Mention formulation type, pack size, and quantity in your enquiry for faster response.

planner.label: Topical Products
planner.title: Topical & Derma Product Requirements
planner.text: For ointments, gels, creams, and sprays — mention application area, base type, preferred packing, and any regulatory market requirements.
checks: Product type: ointment, cream, gel, spray
Tube, jar, or pump packing preference
planner.summary: Topical enquiries move faster with base type, packing format, and target market included.

planner.label: Private Label
planner.title: Private Label Manufacturing Requirements
planner.text: For brand-ready private label supply — share your product list, dosage preferences, artwork readiness, and repeat order planning details.
planner.summary: Private label enquiries need product list, pack details, and artwork status to proceed.
